products.title: Strawberry
products.description: Sweet and succulent strawberries, great for snacking, desserts, or blending into smoothies.

products.title: Tissue Paper Box
products.description: Convenient tissue paper box for everyday use, providing soft and absorbent tissues.

products.title: Water
products.description: Pure and refreshing bottled water, essential for staying hydrated throughout the day.

products.title: Decoration Swing
products.description: The Decoration Swing is a charming addition to your home decor. Crafted with intricate details, it adds a touch of elegance and whimsy to any room.

products.title: Family Tree Photo Frame
products.description: The Family Tree Photo Frame is a sentimental and stylish way to display your cherished family memories. With multiple photo slots, it tells the story of your loved ones.

products.title: House Showpiece Plant
products.description: The House Showpiece Plant is an artificial plant that brings a touch of nature to your home without the need for maintenance. It adds greenery and style to any space.

products.title: Plant Pot
products.description: The Plant Pot is a stylish container for your favorite plants. With a sleek design, it complements your indoor or outdoor garden, adding a modern touch to your plant display.

products.title: Table Lamp
products.description: The Table Lamp is a functional and decorative lighting solution for your living space. With a modern design, it provides both ambient and task lighting, enhancing the atmosphere.

products.title: Bamboo Spatula
products.description: The Bamboo Spatula is a versatile kitchen tool made from eco-friendly bamboo. Ideal for flipping, stirring, and serving various dishes.

products.title: Black Aluminium Cup
products.description: The Black Aluminium Cup is a stylish and durable cup suitable for both hot and cold beverages. Its sleek black design adds a modern touch to your drinkware collection.

products.title: Black Whisk
products.description: The Black Whisk is a kitchen essential for whisking and beating ingredients. Its ergonomic handle and sleek design make it a practical and stylish tool.

products.title: Boxed Blender
products.description: The Boxed Blender is a powerful and compact blender perfect for smoothies, shakes, and more. Its convenient design and multiple functions make it a versatile kitchen appliance.

products.title: Carbon Steel Wok
products.description: The Carbon Steel Wok is a versatile cooking pan suitable for stir-frying, sautéing, and deep frying. Its sturdy construction ensures even heat distribution for delicious meals.

products.title: Chopping Board
products.description: The Chopping Board is an essential kitchen accessory for food preparation. Made from durable material, it provides a safe and hygienic surface for cutting and chopping.

products.title: Citrus Squeezer Yellow
products.description: The Citrus Squeezer in Yellow is a handy tool for extracting juice from citrus fruits. Its vibrant color adds a cheerful touch to your kitchen gadgets.

products.title: Egg Slicer
products.description: The Egg Slicer is a convenient tool for slicing boiled eggs evenly. It's perfect for salads, sandwiches, and other dishes where sliced eggs are desired.

products.title: Electric Stove
products.description: The Electric Stove provides a portable and efficient cooking solution. Ideal for small kitchens or as an additional cooking surface for various culinary needs.

products.title: Fine Mesh Strainer
products.description: The Fine Mesh Strainer is a versatile tool for straining liquids and sifting dry ingredients. Its fine mesh ensures efficient filtering for smooth cooking and baking.

products.title: Fork
products.description: The Fork is a classic utensil for various dining and serving purposes. Its durable and ergonomic design makes it a reliable choice for everyday use.

products.title: Glass
products.description: The Glass is a versatile and elegant drinking vessel suitable for a variety of beverages. Its clear design allows you to enjoy the colors and textures of your drinks.

products.title: Grater Black
products.description: The Grater in Black is a handy kitchen tool for grating cheese, vegetables, and more. Its sleek design and sharp blades make food preparation efficient and easy.
